overview: Aliva Balance offers bioidentical hormone replacement therapy (BHRT for women and TRT for men), weight loss programs, wellness injections, IV therapy, and medical aesthetics services delivered through a nurse practitioner in Paola, Kansas. The clinic provides both in-person and telehealth visits.
highlights: Multiple hormone delivery options including pellets, injections, creams, and patches
Medical aesthetics services including Botox, chemical peels, and hair restoration
targetAudience: Men and women seeking personalized hormone therapy, weight loss support, and aesthetic services.
